title: Broadcast message has no rate limiting or recipient count check
description: The receiveMessageSendBroadcast method (line 903) sends a message to ALL connected clients via App.clientsController.broadcast. While it checks the wired.account.message.broadcast privilege, there is no rate limiting. A user with broadcast privilege can spam all connected users at high frequency. The broadcast is dispatched on a global queue (ClientsController.swift line 45) which could also saturate the thread pool.
recommendation: Add per-client rate limiting for broadcast messages (e.g., 1 per 10 seconds). Consider adding a cooldown or queue for broadcast messages.
